deep_dive.title: The Schrödinger problem on metric graphs
deep_dive.abstract: We study the Schrödinger problem on metric graphs and its different formulations. Starting from a static version, we introduce an equivalent reformulation as entropic optimal transport and show $Γ$-convergence towards static optimal transport. We then rigorously derive a Benamou-Brenier type dynamic version of the Schrödinger problem, thereby extending known results from ${\rm RCD}^*(K,N)$-spaces. With this equivalence at hand, we conclude that the minimum values of the dynamic Schrödinger problem converge towards the squared Wasserstein distance, and minimizers converge to Wasserstein geodesics. We also extend the dynamic formulation to a more general class of initial and final data and show existence of solutions in this setting using the direct method. Lastly, we illustrate our analytical findings by a numerical investigation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: studies Schrödinger problem on metric graphs, entropic optimal transport, convergence to Wasserstein distance
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 研究度量图上的Schrödinger问题、熵最优输运，收敛到Wasserstein距离
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 研究度量图上的Schrödinger问题、熵最优输运，收敛到Wasserstein距离
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 研究度量图上的Schrödinger问题、熵最优输运，收敛到Wasserstein距离
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Studies Schrödinger problem on metric graphs, reformulates as entropic optimal transport, shows Gamma-convergence to Wasserstein distance, derives dynamic Benamou-Brenier formulation, and extends to general initial-final data. Directly relevant to Schrödinger bridge and optimal transport in diffusion bridges.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该文研究度量图上的Schrödinger问题，将其等价转化为熵正则最优输运，并证明Gamma收敛到静态最优输运。进一步推导了动态Benamou-Brenier公式，将已知结果推广到更一般的初始与终末数据。这些成果直接关联Schrödinger桥问题及扩散桥中的最优输运，为后续在图上构建扩散桥提供了理论基础。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该文研究度量图上的Schrödinger问题，将其等价转化为熵正则最优输运，并证明Gamma收敛到静态最优输运。进一步推导了动态Benamou-Brenier公式，将已知结果推广到更一般的初始与终末数据。这些成果直接关联Schrödinger桥问题及扩散桥中的最优输运，为后续在图上构建扩散桥提供了理论基础。
